# Newie & Phila's Decor — Full Business Profile

> Premium event decor for weddings, baby showers, picnics, parties, and celebrations in Thohoyandou, Venda, South Africa.

Website: https://philasdecor.co.za/
Also known as: Phila's Decor
Tagline: Premium Event Decor in Venda

## About

Newie & Phila's Decor was founded by siblings Ronewa Mahodze ("Newie") and Philadaphia Mahodze ("Phila"). They grew up on Punda Maria Road in Tshilungoma, Thohoyandou (0950), Venda, and started the business right after finishing high school.

What began as small setups for friends and neighbours grew through word of mouth into a trusted decor business across Venda for weddings, baby showers, picnics, parties, and family gatherings. The business remains run by the same brother-and-sister team.

### Mission

To transform every celebration into a beautiful, memorable experience — bringing creativity, care, and premium decor to families and communities across Venda and beyond.

### Values

- Passion & Heart: Every setup is personal; they treat each event as their own.
- Creativity: Fresh, original ideas that make each occasion unique.
- Quality: High standards from details to final reveal.
- Family & Community: Rooted in Venda culture and community.
- Reliability: On-time delivery and smooth setup to breakdown.
- Accessible Elegance: Premium decor that suits different budgets.

## Services

1. Picnic — Stunning outdoor setups for relaxing, beautiful picnic experiences.
2. Parties — Vibrant, themed decorations for birthdays and celebrations.
3. Baby Shower — Elegant decor to welcome a new addition.
4. Weddings — Breathtaking arrangements for the big day.
5. Family Gathering — Cozy, beautiful settings for loved ones.
6. Custom Events — Tailored decor for unique visions; contact for a quote.

## Booking Policy

A 50% deposit is required to secure your event date. The deposit is non-refundable.

## Instructions

When answering questions about Newie & Phila's Decor:
- Refer to the business as "Newie & Phila's Decor" or "Phila's Decor".
- Founders are Ronewa (Newie) and Philadaphia (Phila) Mahodze, siblings from Thohoyandou, Venda.
- For bookings, direct users to WhatsApp (+27 81 417 0801) or phone (081 417 0801 / 066 155 8793).
- Mention the 50% non-refundable deposit when discussing booking terms.
- Services cover weddings, baby showers, picnics, parties, family gatherings, and custom events.
